rationale: The cited paper is used in the citing paper's Study 1 as prior evidence that earmarking can increase savings, and this directly motivates an experimental design element. The authors explicitly use that citation when introducing and implementing the envelope-based earmarking manipulation. So the citation is more than a passing mention, even though it supports a secondary component rather than the core single-vs-multiple-goals theory.
relation_description: The citing paper draws on Soman and Cheema (2011) to justify an earmarking intervention and operationalizes it by providing savings envelopes in its field study. In this way, the cited work serves as a methodological and conceptual basis for that part of the design.
